description_long: This object is a detailed model of a small residential neighborhood featuring multiple modern houses arranged along a central road. Each house has a flat roof, large windows, and a boxy, geometric design typical of contemporary architecture. The houses are separated by green lawns and pathways, with some properties featuring private driveways and fenced yards. The terrain is sloped, with retaining walls and elevation changes visible along the sides and back of the property. The overall layout is compact, with houses closely spaced but individually distinct, and the neighborhood is bordered by a road and landscaped green areas. The materials suggest a mix of concrete, glass, wood, and metal, with a focus on clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern residential neighborhood model with multiple flat-roofed, boxy houses, green lawns, and a central road on sloped terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main road, entryways, and the symmetrical arrangement of houses with visible lawns and driveways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped terrain, retaining walls, and staggered placement of houses along the elevation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, fencing, and the continuation of the road behind the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elevation change, retaining walls, and the arrangement of houses along the slope.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, small steps, and minimal overhangs, with some houses having private driveways and fenced front yards.
